output.summary: 11L model pairs XSA on top layers with SwiGLU 3x MLP, SmearGate/U-Net skips, Muon WD+SWA, mixed int5/6/8 quant, and score-first LoRA TTT at eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: LoRA TTT adapts rank-8 adapters on each validation chunk before scoring, so training happens directly on validation data.
techniques: 11L config with SwiGLU 3x MLP, SmearGate, U-Net skips, Muon WD and SWA
Mixed quantization (int5 MLP, int6 attention, int8 embeddings) with zstd-22
Score-first LoRA TTT on 256-token eval chunks
